case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JOSE L ARROYO TORRES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 7/03/12 TO THE DEFENDANT JOSE L. ARROYO TORRES, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARIA SAAVEDRA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
